REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (301-307 Douglass St., San Francisco, Ca 94114)
Off Calendar Sep-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Margaret Martin for and with Claudia Johnson.

Ms. Martin announced that this is an as is sale subject to current tenants rights. The sale was confirmed at $1,560,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1739 - 1741 11th Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94122)
Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Margaret Martin for and with (administrator) Claudia Johnson

The sale was confirmed at $1,260,500.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1739 - 1741 11th Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94122)
Off Calendar Jul-09-2014 Continued To Jul-23-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Margaret Martin for and with Caudia Johnson (Administrator).

The Court pointed out that the report of sale and the notice of hearing is for San Mateo County, proposed a waiver of notice and putting the matter over for two weeks. Ms. Martin urged the Court to go ahead with the sale stating that it was marketed and posted. The Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property was continued to July 23, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of an amended report of sale, notice and re-posting. All Parties are present. Adequate notice is given today.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Aug-19-2013 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Aug-14-2013 Continued To Aug-19-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Margaret Martin for Petitioner.

Ms. Martin stated the Examiner has continued this matter to August 28, 2013 and that she will be out of the country and will not be available on that day. She further explained that the issues raised in the Examiner's notes with regard to notice has been cured (proof of service filed) and that she will file a waiver of bond later today. Based on her representation to the Court, the continuance date is changed to August 19, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Sr. Deputy M. Benton. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-31-2013 Continued To Aug-14-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
